channel.title: Dry Garden Dispatch
channel.description: Fresh takes for succulent and cactus growers.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: propagate succulents leaves
item.description: The persistent myths around propagate succulents leaves, stress-tested against what succulent and cactus growers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your propagation in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying propagation project for succulent — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/proplifting is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the arrangements community this week.

item.title: The light checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified light purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of soil
item.description: The most common early stumbles in soil, and the cheap corrections that fix them for succulent and cactus growers.

item.title: "grow lights succulents" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about grow lights succulents through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your arrangements questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the arrangements questions succulent and cactus growers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in light with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest light adjustments that succulent and cactus growers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: grow lights succulents
item.description: The persistent myths around grow lights succulents, stress-tested against what succulent and cactus growers actually report.
